response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering skills with diverse project experience, including AI-agent infrastructure and open-source contributions. However, the role requires a Principal Engineer with deep AI/ML expertise, cloud strategy leadership, and 15+ years of experience, which the resume does not fully reflect in depth or seniority.
strengths: Broad technical expertise across full-stack, embedded, and infrastructure systems
Entrepreneurial experience with open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective)
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent tooling and developer frameworks
concerns: Lacks explicit AI/ML product leadership or recognized expertise in the field
Experience (12-13 years) falls short of the 15-year requirement
No advanced degree in AI or related technical field
